title: Dutton Ranch season 2 has all-but confirmed a release window after Ed Harris revealed filming complaints — and there's a huge change to the Yellowstone spinoff that nobody is talking about
summary: Journalist Marc Malkin has posted the full footage to his Instagram , where Harris confirms that Dutton Ranch season 2 is due to begin filming in 2027. Now let's examine what Harris allegedly knows about his season 2 character arc.
